/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/InputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/OpenGLManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/ParametricMapping.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/ParametricSpace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/Renderable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/RevolutionSurface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/UVTriangleManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/Curve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/BezierCurve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/BezierSurface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/BSplineCurve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/BSplineSurface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/Icosphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/HalfEdge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/IFSEdge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/IFSManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/IFSTransform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/UVTriangleIFS.cpp.o -o main  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglut.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXi.so /usr/lib/libarmadillo.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmpxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmpfr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so
